Name: SpEffectParam
Description: Determines the parameters for special effects.

Fields.Name: Icon ID
Fields.Description: The icon id to display in the interface whilst the effect is active.

Fields.Name: Trigger at HP Below %
Fields.Description:
The maximum percentage of HP required for effect to activate.
-1 = no requirement, 40 = less than 40% HP, 80 = less than 80% HP

Fields.Name: Duration
Fields.Description: The duration of effect. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Trigger Interval
Fields.Description: The interval for the contents of this effect to be reapplied. 0 = once per frame. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Maximum HP %
Fields.Description:
Multiplies maximum HP. See bCurrHPIndependeMaxHP to determine how current HP behaves.
1 = default, .5 = -50%, 2 = +100%

Fields.Name: Maximum MP %
Fields.Description: Multiplies maximum MP.

Fields.Name: Maximum Stamina %
Fields.Description: Multiplies maximum stamina.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Slash
Fields.Description: Multiplies slash physical damage taken. Values below 1 mean damage is reduced, values above 1 mean damage is increased.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Strike
Fields.Description: Multiplies strike physical damage taken. Values below 1 mean damage is reduced, values above 1 mean damage is increased.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Thrust
Fields.Description: Multiplies thrust physical damage taken. Values below 1 mean damage is reduced, values above 1 mean damage is increased.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Physical
Fields.Description: Multiplies neutral physical damage taken. Values below 1 mean damage is reduced, values above 1 mean damage is increased.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Magic
Fields.Description: Multiplies magic damage taken. Values below 1 mean damage is reduced, values above 1 mean damage is increased.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Fire
Fields.Description: Multiplies fire damage taken. Values below 1 mean damage is reduced, values above 1 mean damage is increased.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Lightning
Fields.Description: Multiplies lightning damage taken. Values below 1 mean damage is reduced, values above 1 mean damage is increased.

Fields.Name: Post-Defense Attack %: Physical
Fields.Description: Multiplies physical damage dealt (post-defense, bypasses attack rating)

Fields.Name: Post-Defense Attack %: Magic
Fields.Description: Multiplies magic damage dealt (post-defense, bypasses attack rating)

Fields.Name: Post-Defense Attack %: Fire
Fields.Description: Multiplies fire damage dealt (post-defense, bypasses attack rating)

Fields.Name: Post-Defense Attack %: Lightning
Fields.Description: Multiplies lightning damage dealt (post-defense, bypasses attack rating)

Fields.Name: Attack %: Physical
Fields.Description: Multiplies physical damage dealt.

Fields.Name: Attack %: Magic
Fields.Description: Multiplies magic damage dealt.

Fields.Name: Attack %: Fire
Fields.Description: Multiplies fire damage dealt.

Fields.Name: Attack %: Lightning
Fields.Description: Multiplies lightning damage dealt.

Fields.Name: Damage: Physical
Fields.Description: Adds physical damage to attack rating.

Fields.Name: Damage: Magic
Fields.Description: Adds magic damage to attack rating.

Fields.Name: Damage: Fire
Fields.Description: Adds fire damage to attack rating.

Fields.Name: Damage: Lightning
Fields.Description: Adds lightning damage to attack rating.

Fields.Name: Defense %: Physical
Fields.Description: Multiplies physical defense.

Fields.Name: Defense %: Magic
Fields.Description: Multiplies magic defense.

Fields.Name: Defense %: Fire
Fields.Description: Multiplies fire defense.

Fields.Name: Defense %: Lightning
Fields.Description: Multiplies lightning defense.

Fields.Name: Defense: Physical
Fields.Description: Adds to physical defense.

Fields.Name: Defense: Magic
Fields.Description: Adds to magic defense.

Fields.Name: Defense: Fire
Fields.Description: Adds to fire defense.

Fields.Name: Defense: Lightning
Fields.Description: Adds to lightning defense.

Fields.Name: Damage on Hit %: Unguarded
Fields.Description: Multiplier to the damage suffered by the target if it is not guarding when hit.

Fields.Name: Damage on Hit %: Weak Point
Fields.Description: Multiplier to the damage suffered by the target if it is hit in a part designated as a 'weak point'.

Fields.Name: Damage on Hit %: Standard
Fields.Description: Multiplier to the damage suffered by the target if it is hit normally.

Fields.Name: Maximum HP Source Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier to the maxHpRate values present on the character this effect belongs to.

Fields.Name: Behavior ID
Fields.Description:
The ID of BehaviorParam or BehaviorParam_PC to apply to the effect's owner.
Requires stateInfo 142 to function for non-player characters.
Requires stateInfo 171 to function for player characters.

Fields.Name: Damage HP by Percentage
Fields.Description: Causes HP loss to the character this effect belongs to by the set value. Negative values will restore. The value is a percentage of the maximum HP of the character.

Fields.Name: Damage HP by Point
Fields.Description: Causes HP loss to the character this effect belongs to by the set value. Negative values will restore. The value is a flat value.

Fields.Name: Damage MP by Percentage
Fields.Description: Causes MP loss to the character this effect belongs to by the set value. Negative values will restore. The value is a percentage of the maximum MP of the character.

Fields.Name: Damage MP by Point
Fields.Description: Causes MP loss to the character this effect belongs to by the set value. Negative values will restore. The value is a flat value.

Fields.Name: MP Recovery Speed
Fields.Description: The amount of MP recovered per second.

Fields.Name: Damage Stamina by Percentage
Fields.Description: Causes Stamina loss to the character this effect belongs to by the set value. Negative values will restore. The value is a percentage of the maximum MP of the character.

Fields.Name: Damage Stamina by Point
Fields.Description: Causes Stamina loss to the character this effect belongs to by the set value. Negative values will restore. The value is a flat value.

Fields.Name: Stamina Recovery Speed
Fields.Description: The amount of stamina recovered per second.

Fields.Name: Magic Effect Duration Change
Fields.Description:
For only spells whose effect duration is set to 0.1 seconds or more, add or subtract the time set to the effect duration.

Lingering Dragoncrest Ring uses stateinfo 193 which checks for isExtendSpEffectLife.

Fields.Name: Damage Durability by Point
Fields.Description: Causes Durability loss to the used equipment of the character this effect belongs to by the set value. Negative values will restore. The value is a flat value.

Fields.Name: Hits per Durability Loss
Fields.Description: Affects hits required before durability is consumed. 5 = +5 hits before durability consumed, -5 = -5 hits before durability consumed

Fields.Name: Attack %: Stamina
Fields.Description: Multiplies stamina damage dealt.

Fields.Name: Inflict: Poison
Fields.Description: Adds to the amount of poison status effect inflicted.

Fields.Name: Inflict: Toxic
Fields.Description: Adds to the amount of toxic status effect inflicted.

Fields.Name: Inflict: Bleed
Fields.Description: Adds to the amount of bleed status effect inflicted.

Fields.Name: Inflict: Curse
Fields.Description: Adds to the amount of curse status effect inflicted.

Fields.Name: Fall Damage %
Fields.Description: Does nothing. Fall control effects use stateInfo 47

Fields.Name: Soul Absorption %
Fields.Description: Multiplies souls received from enemies.

Fields.Name: Equipment Weight %
Fields.Description: Multiplies maximum equip weight.

Fields.Name: Item Weight %
Fields.Description: Multiplies maximum item weight. Does nothing. Probable DeS remnant.

Fields.Name: Souls
Fields.Description: Flat increase/decrease to souls.

Fields.Name: Animation ID Offset
Fields.Description: Offsets animation IDs. Frequently used to make enemies swap movesets.

Fields.Name: Soul Possession %
Fields.Description: Multiplies the amount of souls granted after death. Requires base value in character's NpcParam row.

Fields.Name: Target Priority Addition
Fields.Description: Chance for an enemy to switch aggro targets to/away the effect's owner. Values range from -1 to 1. +1 = 100% chance to target owner instead of current target, -1 = 100% chance to target somebody else instead of current target (effect owner).

Fields.Name: Visual Search Reduction %
Fields.Description:
The value to reduce the distance at which enemies see the effect's owner.
0 = default, 50 = -50% sight distance, 100 = -100% sight distance

Fields.Name: Auditory Search Reduction %
Fields.Description:
The value to reduce the distance at which enemies hear the effect's owner.
0 = default, 50 = -50% hearing distance, 100 = -100% hearing distance

Fields.Name: Animation Playback Speed
Fields.Description: Multiplies animation speeds. 1 = default, 0.5 = -50% speed, 2 = +100% speed

Fields.Name: Resistance %: Poison
Fields.Description: Multiplies stat based poison resistance.

Fields.Name: Resistance %: Toxic
Fields.Description: Multiplies stat based toxic resistance.

Fields.Name: Resistance %: Bleed
Fields.Description: Multiplies stat based bleed resistance.

Fields.Name: Resistance %: Curse
Fields.Description: Multiplies stat based curse resistance.

Fields.Name: Soul Steal %
Fields.Description: The defense power against HP loss when soul steal move is used.

Fields.Name: Effect Duration Change %
Fields.Description: Multiplies the duration of the status effect with the stateInfo specified by lifeReductionType.

Fields.Name: HP Recovery %
Fields.Description: Multiplies healing received.

Fields.Name: Expire SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: The ID of spEffectParam to add once this effect ends.

Fields.Name: Cycle SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: The ID of spEffectParam to add once every motionInterval.

Fields.Name: Attack SpEffect ID
Fields.Description:
ID of spEffectParam to add to victim when the owner hits an enemy.
Requires stateInfo 152 or 153 (and likely other values used for weapon buffs) to work (VFX present)

Fields.Name: Guard Defense Repulsion %
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to guard defense (for deflection).

Fields.Name: Guard Stability %
Fields.Description: Multiplies shield stability. Requires stateInfo 158 (magic shield) or stateInfo 204 (great magic shield) to work (VFX present). Note that stability values over 100 nullify all stamina damage.

Fields.Name: Raycast Passed Time
Fields.Description: Activation time for passing the line of sight (used for the Evil Eye). In milliseconds.

Fields.Name: Poise
Fields.Description: Flat increase/decrease to poise. Requires stateInfo 155 to work.

Fields.Name: Ammunition Distance %
Fields.Description: Addition to the bowDistRate field of the held weapon for the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: SpEffect Category
Fields.Description: Determines special effect stacking behavior; how effects will react when another effect in the same category is added.

Fields.Name: Category Priority
Fields.Description: Used with specific spCategory values to determine stacking behavior. The higher the value, the lower the priority.

Fields.Name: Save Category
Fields.Description: Used to save effects so that they remain after quitting and loading the game. Only one effect per saveCategory is saved.

Fields.Name: Attunement Slots (Magic)
Fields.Description: Increases attunement slots.

Fields.Name: Attunement Slots (Miracle)
Fields.Description: Increases attunement slots.

Fields.Name: Damage: Humanity
Fields.Description: Flat increase/decrease to humanity stat. -1 = add 1 humanity, 1 = remove 1 humanity

Fields.Name: Repulsion Defense
Fields.Description: Modifies the repulsion defense for the effect owner's current weapon.

Fields.Name: Repulsion Damage Absorption %
Fields.Description: The absorption rate to use when calculating the repulsion damage for the effect owner's current weapon.

Fields.Name: Bleed Damage Incurred %
Fields.Description: Multiplier to the damage portion of the Bleed status effect when it is triggered on the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: No Impact
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Small Impact
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Medium Impact
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Large Impact
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Medium Blow
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Push
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Strike
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Small Blow
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Minimal
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Uppercut
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Blow Backwards
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Breath
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Attack Attribute
Fields.Description: Attack attribute to use when applying attack against the victim for attacks from this effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Special Attribute
Fields.Description: Special attributes to use when applying attack against the victim for attacks from this effect's owner.

Fields.Name: State Info
Fields.Description:
ID of hardcoded system to use for unique effects. Causes effects itself and is necessary for certain fields to work.
Also used for visual effects by referring to the ID of a SpEffectVfxParam to use if useSpEffectEffect is true.

Fields.Name: Weapon Influence Type
Fields.Description: Determines how specific fields, such as damage modifiers, behave with certain attack categories

Fields.Name: Movement Type
Fields.Description: Offsets character movement animations.

Fields.Name: Effect Duration Change Type
Fields.Description: Determines the type of status effect to modify the duration of. SpEffects with the specified stateInfo will be affected.

Fields.Name: Throw Condition
Fields.Description: Affects the throwing masks.

Fields.Name: Behavior ID: Condition
Fields.Description: A condition value for the BehaviorJudgeId value used by the current owner.

Fields.Name: Behavior ID: Add
Fields.Description: A value for the BehaviorJudgeId value used by the current owner.

Fields.Name: Apply to Self
Fields.Description: Will affect the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Apply to Friend
Fields.Description: Will affect the effect's owner's allies.

Fields.Name: Apply to Enemy
Fields.Description: Will affect the effect's owner's enemies.

Fields.Name: Apply to Player
Fields.Description: Will affect the player.

Fields.Name: Apply to Non-Player
Fields.Description: Will affect non-player characters.

Fields.Name: Apply to Host
Fields.Description: Will affect host player in multiplayer sessions.

Fields.Name: Apply to Phantom
Fields.Description: Will affect all types of client players in multiplayer sessions.

Fields.Name: Apply to Friendly Phantom
Fields.Description: Will affect friendly client players in multiplayer sessions.

Fields.Name: Apply to Hostile Phantom
Fields.Description: Will affect hostile client players in multiplayer sessions.

Fields.Name: Apply to Attacker
Fields.Description:
When effect is added via equipParamWeapon spEffectBehavior field, this field determines if the effect will be applied to attacked enemies instead of the effect owner.
true = affects victim, false = affects owner

Fields.Name: Display Icon when Inactive
Fields.Description: If ON, the interface icon for the effect will still disabled even if the effect is inactive due to a failed conditional check.

Fields.Name: Trigger Particles via SpEffect
Fields.Description: If ON, visual effects via SpEffectVfxParam will be used. See stateInfo for the ID of SpEffectVfxParam to be used.

Fields.Name: Apply Intelligence Correction
Fields.Description: If ON, the intelligence stat will be used to correct various fields, such as damage.

Fields.Name: Apply Faith Correction
Fields.Description: If ON, the faith stat will be used to correct various fields, such as damage.

Fields.Name: Apply Modifiers only after Game Clear
Fields.Description: If ON, this effect will only be active in NG+ or higher.

Fields.Name: Apply Modifiers to Sorcery
Fields.Description: If ON, damage and scaling fields will apply to sorcery and pyromancies.

Fields.Name: Apply Modifiers to Miracles
Fields.Description: If ON, damage and scaling fields will apply to miracles.

Fields.Name: Clear Held Souls
Fields.Description: Sets soul counter to 0.

Fields.Name: Request: Friendly Phantom
Fields.Description: Used only by White Sign Soapstone. Probably used for network matchmaking.

Fields.Name: Request: Hostile Phantom
Fields.Description: Used only by Red Sign Soapstone. Probably used for network matchmaking.

Fields.Name: Request: Invader
Fields.Description: Used only by (Cracked) Red Eye Orb. Probably used for network matchmaking.

Fields.Name: Request: Kick Phantom
Fields.Description: Possibly kicks all clients out of your world.

Fields.Name: Request: Leave
Fields.Description: Used only by Black Separation Crystal. Probably used to leave network sessions.

Fields.Name: Request: Character Invader
Fields.Description: Used only by Black Eye Orb (Lautrec quest and cut Shiva quest).

Fields.Name: Is Owner Undying
Fields.Description: If ON, character cannot become a corpse (and thus die).

Fields.Name: Ignore Current HP on Max HP Change
Fields.Description: Determines how current HP behaves when maximum HP is modified. true = current HP will not change, false = current HP will change with max HP

Fields.Name: Disable Durability
Fields.Description: If ON, disables durability damage to the effect owner's weapons and armor.

Fields.Name: Ignore Visual Search Adjustments
Fields.Description: If ON, visual search adjustments from sightSearchEnemyCut are ignored by the effect owner.

Fields.Name: Ignore Auditory Search Adjustments
Fields.Description: If ON, auditory search adjustments from hearingSearchEnemyCut are ignored by the effect owner.

Fields.Name: Ignore Magic Block
Fields.Description: If ON, magic blocking effects are ignored by the effect owner (Vow of Silence).

Fields.Name: Ignore Decoy Target
Fields.Description: If ON, the effect owner will ignore fake targets (Aural Decoy projectiles).

Fields.Name: Ignore Decoy Target (Undead)
Fields.Description: If ON, the effect owner will ignore fake undead targets (Alluring Skull projectiles).

Fields.Name: Ignore Decoy Target (Animal)
Fields.Description: If ON, the effect owner will ignore fake animal targets.

Fields.Name: Ignore Animation Playback Speed Changes
Fields.Description: If ON, the effect owner ignores grabityRate changes.

Fields.Name: Is Immune to Poison
Fields.Description: If ON, effect owner becomes immune to poison.

Fields.Name: Is Immune to Toxic
Fields.Description: If ON, effect owner becomes immune to toxic.

Fields.Name: Is Immune to Bleed
Fields.Description: If ON, effect owner becomes immune to bleed.

Fields.Name: Is Immune to Curse
Fields.Description: If ON, effect owner becomes immune to curse.

Fields.Name: Is Vulnerable to Charm
Fields.Description: If ON, effect owner is vulnerable to charm effects (Undead Rapport).

Fields.Name: Enable Duration via TimeAct Event
Fields.Description: If ON, the effect duration can be extended by a TimeAct event..

Fields.Name: Enable Target Activation
Fields.Description: If ON, enable the activation conditions for the Evil Eye.

Fields.Name: Cancel Effect on Fire Damage
Fields.Description: If ON, this effect will be cancelled early if fire damage is applied to the effect owner.

Fields.Name: Is Affected by Spell Duration Extension
Fields.Description: Determines if effectEndurance will be affected by stateInfo 193 which is used by the Lingering Dragoncrest Ring.

Fields.Name: Request: Leave Undead Match
Fields.Description: Used only by Purple Coward's Crystal.

Fields.Name: Trigger: None
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in no covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: Way of White
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in Way of White covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: Princess Guard
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in Princess Guard covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: Warrior of Sunlight
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in Warrior of Sunlight covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: Darkwaith
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in Darkwraith covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: Path of the Dragon
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in Path of the Dragon covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: Gravelord Servant
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in Gravelord Servant covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: Forest Hunter
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in Forest Hunter covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: Blade of the Dark Moon
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in Blade of the Dark Moon covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: Chaos Servant
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in Chaos Servant covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: 10
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in ? covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: 11
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in ? covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: 12
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in ? covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: 13
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in ? covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: 14
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in ? covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: 15
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in ? covenant.
